allow: PowerShell(docker compose exec -T frontend bash -c "grep -roE 'chatAvatar[a-zA-Z-]+|stChatMessage[a-zA-Z]+' /usr/local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/streamlit/static/static/js/ 2>/dev/null | sort -u | head -20")

PowerShell(docker compose exec -T frontend bash -c "grep -roE 'stStatusWidget|stExpanderDetails|stExpanderHeader|stMainBlockContainer|stMain[a-zA-Z]+|stAppViewContainer|block-container' /usr/local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/streamlit/static/static/js/ 2>/dev/null | sort -u | head -20")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T backend bash -c "pip install -q pytest pytest-asyncio pytest-mock httpx openpyxl 2>&1 | tail -3")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T backend python -m pytest /app/tests/test_execute_sql.py -v 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T backend python -m pytest /app/tests -q 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T frontend bash -c "pip install -q pytest pytest-mock 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2; python -m pytest /app/tests -q" 2>&1)
